context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel game
context.role: Bottom area of cage where poop accumulates, swipe target for cleaning
context.screen_position: Bottom of screen, y=110 to y=128, full width (0 to 128)
context.usage_scenario: Always visible. Player swipes this area to clean poop. Poop objects (2x2px) appear randomly on floor surface. Floor itself does not change appearance when dirty.

visual_specification.shape: Horizontal rectangular area, bottom portion of screen
visual_specification.details: Solid light tan color (#FFCCAA), darker than background (#FFF1E8). Extends from y=110 to y=128 (18px tall). Full screen width (128px). No texture, pattern, or grid. Poop objects render on top of this surface.

relationships.shared_with: Warm tan color palette with environment
relationships.differences_from: cage_background: darker tan vs lighter cream, bottom area vs full screen. Perch: area vs bar.

explicit_negations: Floor color does not change when dirty
Does not show wear or stains
